invariants.name: Step gating parity
invariants.assertion: Step 2 remains blocked until linux selection; Step 3 remains blocked until artifact_ref exists.

invariants.name: Hash routing parity
invariants.assertion: #step-1, #step-2, #step-3 route handling and block/allow outcomes remain identical to baseline.

invariants.name: Generate/fetch parity
invariants.assertion: Generate, status polling, and fetch pathways preserve sequencing, gating, and final artifact handoff.

invariants.name: Jira flow parity
invariants.assertion: Connect, verify, status, list, attach, and disconnect behavior contracts remain unchanged.

invariants.name: Tool invocation parity
invariants.assertion: Tool names, argument shapes, and call ordering in UI logic remain unchanged.

invariants.name: Fallback continuity
invariants.assertion: Text fallback remains available and semantically unchanged if UI bundle is unavailable.

invariants.name: Build/serve parity
invariants.assertion: Existing build and serve commands succeed without workflow behavior changes.

rollback_trigger: Any gate behavior drift from baseline
